files.patch: @@ -55,1 +55,1 @@ -1.48, 20 February, 2026 +1.49, 7 May 2026 @@ -501,0 +501,4 @@ +The jtreg tool adds --enable-native-access=ALL-UNNAMED to the list of Java test +runtime command-line arguments for actions with /native tag -- unless +there is one or more explicit custom --enable-native-access argument(s) present +in the list of test runtime arguments.
